title: Too Short A Night
content:
Lily of Streams lay by my side last night
    And to my prayers gave answers of delight;
    Day came before our fairy-tale was finished,
    Because the tale was long, not short the night.

    From the Persian of Abu-Said (978-1062).
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator), titled "Too Short A Night", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
